subject: [DCAE-HV-VES] Move to use strimzi kafka tpl
commit_message:
[DCAE-HV-VES] Move to use strimzi kafka tpl

Move hv-ves to use strimzi kakfa tpl
Topic naming is invalid so adding overrides to tpl

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ied93c6329f51c3219b09b4f67f174c9e15727188
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1854

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 4 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Hi guys. The DCAE topic names (and others) are invalid to be used as a k8s resource so an override is needed.
Would it be possible to maybe consider moving to a valid topic naming convention?
https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Hi guys. The DCAE topic names (and others) are invalid to be used as a k8s resource so an override is needed.
> Would it be possible to maybe consider moving to a valid topic naming convention?
> https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/

Most of the topic names are configuration - as long as the pub-sub are modified to new names, should be fine. For HV-VES, only active consumers are the in the testsuite.
